response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: There was no song reference or vocal lyrics, so the manual transcription was performed. 2. JSON Usage: The audio and visual events were fully manually transcribed and translated. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously set to match the rapid vocal pacing and sound transitions. Included title cards for 'Traffic Enforcement Training' and 'National Museum' during silent/non-vocal moments.
